{
  "score": 0.5,
   "feedback": "The answer partially addresses the question, but lacks some key points. It is essential to include all six general maintenance practices for carpentry tools. The correct answer should cover all the necessary steps.",
   "correctedAnswer": [
      "1) Use tools for the right purpose (proper use);",
      "2) Sharpen cutting tools when blunt;",
      "3) Clean after use (remove dust);",
      "4) Repair broken parts;",
      "5) Oil metal parts to prevent rust;",
      "6) Store properly in a toolbox/rack."
   ]
}

parsedContent.feedback: The answer partially addresses the question, but lacks some key points. It is essential to include all six general maintenance practices for carpentry tools. The correct answer should cover all the necessary steps.

5) Oil metal parts to prevent rust;
